jobs.title: Frontend Developer Vue 3 (100% remoto)
jobs.rawDescription: Buscamos un/a Frontend Developer Vue 3 para trabajar en un conocido cliente del sector seguros. Posición 100% remota y estable Es necesario almenos 3 años de experiencia con Vue. ️ Responsabilidades • Creación de arquitectura y estructura de directorios para aplicaciones JavaSrcript (TS) basadas en el framework Vue3 • Creación de librerías de utilidades básicas, estilos en SASS con la metodología BEM, setear traducciones i18n, login de usuarios y seguridad, conexiones con servicios REST, sprites y generadores para el uso de SVGs y layout base para construir las aplicaciones • Creación de librería de componentes genéricos SFC en Vue 3. Componentes completamente reutilizables aplicando el estilo propio del cliente con personalización mediante props, slots y variables css • Creación de una nueva aplicación de CRM utilizando los componentes base para generar las pantallas y utilizades requeridas por el negocio. La aplicación permite la planificación de los mediadores (usuarios), con utilidades de agenda para citas y recordatorios, tareas al estilo kanban y gestión completa de los clientes del mediador • Diseñar componentes, formularios y páginas del aplicativo • Aplicación de diseño responsive con patrón mobile first • Documentar y hacer el testing de componentes mediante la librería Storybook ¿Y nosotros qué ofrecemos? • Contrato indefinido : Desde el primer día, con opción de 12 o 14 pagas • Modelo 100% teletrabajo • Horario flexible : Entrada 8.30h salida 18h (con flexibilidad) viernes de 8h a 15h. Verano: Julio y Agosto: intensivo de 8h a 15h • Vacaciones : 22 días de vacaciones + 2 días de libre disposición, además de los días 24 y 31 de diciembre libres. • Contrato indefinido : Desde el primer día, con opción de 12 o 14 pagas. • Retribución flexible : Tarjeta restaurante, cheque guardería, seguro médico, formación y otros beneficios con ventajas fiscales. • Club de ventajas : Descuentos en tecnología, ocio y formación. • Formación continua : Acceso a Udemy Busines

score.reason: Strong Vue 3 + TS architectural role with senior responsibilities (libraries, CRM, component design). Stable permanent contract, 100% remote from Spain with flexible hours. Spanish-language posting in Madrid aligns perfectly with Alfonso's market and timezone.

jobs.title: Desarrollador/a Front-End Vue 3 (Senior)
jobs.rawDescription: Desarrollador/a Front-End Vue 3 (Senior) Company: knowmad mood Location: Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain We are knowmad mood! Somos una compañía líder en transformación digital, en constante evolución y a la vanguardia de la tecnología. Nacimos para provocar un cambio real a través de la innovación y el desarrollo sostenible, con la misión de aportar valor a los clientes e impulsar nuestro talento. Formado por más de 3.000 personas creativas, digitales e innovadoras conectadas a un propósito y capaces de generar conexiones con personas de todo el mundo. Un equipo responsable, flexible y con alta capacidad de adaptación a las necesidades de nuestros clientes y del mercado, a la vez que proporciona valor, visión, creatividad, expertise, profesionalidad y pasión por la tecnología en cada proyecto. Los valores que marcan nuestro rumbo y nos guían hacia la excelencia son la colaboración, la innovación, el compromiso, la diversión y la conﬁanza. ¿Qué es lo que valoramos? Experiencia de al menos 5 años como Desarrollador Front-End especializado en: Dominio de Vue 3 para el desarrollo de aplicaciones modernas y escalables. Experiencia en creación de arquitecturas y estructuras de directorios para aplicaciones JavaScript/TypeScript basadas en Vue 3. Desarrollo de librerías reutilizables de componentes (SFC) aplicando buenas prácticas de diseño, personalización mediante props, slots y variables CSS. Amplios conocimientos en HTML, CSS, SASS (metodología BEM) y diseño responsive bajo el enfoque mobile-first. Experiencia en integración con servicios REST, gestión de autenticación de usuarios y aspectos de seguridad en aplicaciones front. Conocimiento en herramientas modernas como Vite, Storybook y gestión de assets como SVG sprites. Experiencia documentando y testeando componentes mediante Storybook. Experiencia en desarrollo de aplicaciones complejas como CRM o herramientas de gestión de negocio. Capacidad de trabajo en equipo y comunicación efectiva con equipos multidiscipl

score.reason: Excellent Vue 3 and TypeScript match for senior role. Remote policy unclear—Madrid location with no mention of flexible work, critical for Spain-based remote requirement.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Vue-primary senior role at €60k–€90k with TypeScript bonus. Spain explicitly included in location options. No gaps; strong match.

jobs.title: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue)
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bulgaria, Bosnia, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Romania, Serbia, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Finland, Norway, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Germany, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. 🎯 Your main goal will be to build and ship end-to-end TypeScript product features that customers feel in their workflows the same week - balancing speed, quality, and high security standards. To do so, you’ll own outcomes across the full stack and stay close to users, product, and metrics: End-to-end product ownership Own a product area surface from discovery to delivery, including iteration after launch. Ship high-quality features fast across the TypeScript stack, balancing UX, performance, and maintainability. Partner closely with Product to translate customer problems into clear scopes and

score.reason: Strong Vue and TypeScript expertise align well, but full-stack responsibilities with Node.js backend exceed Alfonso's basic backend depth. Berlin-based with Spain-inclusive locations. Requires solid backend systems and orchestration architecture knowledge.
red_flags: Node.js proficiency below senior level expectation

However, the core mission is LLM orchestration and prompt reliability—building systems that "consistently generate the right output" and "stay grounded in workflows." This is AI/LLM engineering, not frontend UI development. Vue/TS are the implementation layer for an AI-centric role.

needsReview.title: Senior Software Engineer - TypeScript /Node.js
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer - TypeScript /Node.js About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. You’ll join our Engineering team, working within a dedicated squad of up to 10 members. This role offers a unique chance to collaborate closely, innovate, and drive impactful results end-to-end. Role We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Engineering & Data team. In this role, you’ll take full ownership of your scope from solution design to deployment, balancing quality with efficient delivery. Design & build business-focused full-stack applications in a cutting-edge, evolving environment Contribute to our state-of-the-art growth engine, helping scale apps & games to millions of users Participate in business strategy discussions and consistently deliver innovative solutions to business teams Demonstrate technical excellence and help define best practices — write the code others aspire to Develop team tooling and be a driving force behind improvement proposals Support teammates' growth Own features end-to-end: from architecture and implementation to deployment and monitoring Work with event-driven systems (SQS/SNS) to build robust, decoupled services Profile (MUST have) 5+ years of professional software engineering experience Strong proficiency in TypeScript/ Node.js (NestJS) Good knowledge of industry best practices (SOLID, KISS, YAGNI, DDD, TDD...) Extens

score.reason: No Vue.js—violates core specialization requirement. Backend/full-stack focus requires deep Node.js + NestJS expertise beyond his basic Node knowledge; Paris location lacks remote confirmation.
red_flags: NestJS required, not in skills matrix

needsReview.title: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js)
needsReview.rawDescription: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js) About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. Role We’re looking for an Engineering Lead (TypeScript/Node.js) to join our Engineering & Data team. As an Engineering Lead, you'll combine strong individual technical contributions with team leadership. You'll be responsible for the technical direction of your squad, the growth of your engineers, and the delivery of high-impact projects. This is a hybrid IC/manager role — you'll still write code, but your leverage is through the team. Lead the technical direction and architecture for your squad's domain Drive design reviews, set coding standards, and ensure engineering excellence Own the full delivery of complex, cross-team technical initiatives Build, scale and operate Node.js/TypeScript backend services on AWS/EKS Define the infrastructure and reliability strategy for your team's systems Partner with Product and Data to translate business goals into technical roadmaps Grow engineers through 1:1s, code reviews, mentorship and technical coaching Identify systemic risks and drive improvements before they become incidents Be an ambassador for engineering culture: psychological safety, pragmatism, and craft Profile (MUST have) 7+ years of professional software engineering experience 2+ years of experience leading an engineering team (formal or informal) Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript

score.reason: Senior-level leadership role correctly positioned for seniority, but fundamentally backend/DevOps-focused with Node.js expertise required as core—Alfonso specializes in Vue.js frontend. Hybrid Paris contradicts Spain-based, remote-first requirement.
red_flags: Expert Node.js required, Alfonso is basic

needsReview.title: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK About Sentry Bad software is everywhere, and we’re tired of it. Sentry is on a mission to help developers write better software faster so we can get back to enjoying technology. With more than $217 million in funding and 100,000+ organizations that believe we’re on to something, we're building performance and error monitoring tools that help companies like Disney, Microsoft, and Atlassian spend less time fixing bugs and more time building products. Sentry embraces a hybrid work model across our global hubs, with Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays set as in-office anchor days to encourage meaningful collaboration. If you like to selfishly build things that make your digital life better, come help us build the next generation of software monitoring tools. About this role Are you ready to redefine the future of JavaScript development? Are you a seasoned JavaScript expert who gets a thrill from tackling complex challenges across the entire JavaScript ecosystem? Do you believe that AI can be a powerful partner in crafting elegant, high-impact code? If you're ready to leave the mundane behind and join a team that's shaping the tools used by millions of developers globally, we've got an opportunity for you at Sentry. This isn't your typical Senior Software Engineer position. As a key member of our growing JavaScript SDK team, you'll be at the forefront of innovation, working on everything from our cutting-edge SDKs for the React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS, and beyond. You won't just be maintaining code; you'll be pushing the boundaries of what's possible in developer tooling across the full spectrum of the modern JavaScript framework landscape. In this role you will Join our JavaScript SDK team and get ready to build the future. You'll be at the forefront, working on: A Universe of JavaScript Challenges: Dive deep into our extensive suite of JavaScript SDKs, with a broad focus on framework support spanning the mode

score.reason: Toronto-based hybrid with in-office anchor days is incompatible with Spain/CET location. Role is JavaScript SDK infrastructure engineering, not frontend UI—Vue is secondary among many target frameworks (React, Next.js, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS).
red_flags: vue is secondary framework, not primary

needsReview.rawDescription: Fullstack Software Engineer RoR/JS W/M Are you looking to have an impact on the daily life of millions of entrepreneurs in France (and tomorrow in Europe)? Are you looking for a work environment that values trust, proactivity, and autonomy? Are our Engineering principles aligned with your vision? Then Pennylane is the right place for you ! Our vision We aim to become the most beloved financial Operating System of French SMEs and Accounting Firms (and soon, European ones). We help entrepreneurs rid themselves of time-consuming tasks related to accounting and finance while providing them with access to key financial information to assist in making the best decisions for their business. About us Pennylane is one of the fastest growing Fintechs in France (and soon to be in Europe!) In 5 years of existence, we’ve managed to : 💻 Make ourselves known as a groundbreaking accounting and financial software for small businesses and their accountants 💰 Raise a total of €400 millions, including from Sequoia, the famous fund from the Silicon Valley who invested early in companies like Google, Facebook, Airbnb, Stripe, Paypal and much more... 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Grow from 7 cofounders to 1000 happy Pennylaners : we’re now recognized as one of the greatest places to work in France (and also remotely), with a 4.6/5 rating on Glassdoor . 🌍 Build an international environment with more than 25 nationalities, with a strong remote-friendly culture, where 30% of the employees are already working from all parts of Europe 🤝 Earn the trust of thousands of customers and accounting firms and obtain outstanding ratings 🚀 Already more than 900,000 small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and over 6000 accounting firms use Pennylane in France! Your mission You will join our Growth Team and work collaboratively with Thomas the growth engineer team lead within the Marketign website squad. We are looking for a talented full stack software engineer whose main mission will be to ⏬ Global Scaling: Build

score.reason: No Vue.js (violates F1 hard filter). RoR/JS is backend-heavy, requires Ruby expertise Alfonso lacks. Paris office location with unclear remote policy.

needsReview.title: Deducta — Senior Frontend Product Engineer
needsReview.rawDescription: Deducta — Senior Frontend Product Engineer Deducta | Senior Frontend Product Engineer | London, UK | Hybrid (3 days/week in office) | £150k+ cash/equity We’re a data intelligence platform for global enterprises. We are well funded, growing fast, and solving the most pressing data challenges for some of the largest and most recognizable companies in the world. The capabilities of SOTA LLMs enable us to this at an unprecedented scale and success rate. We’re looking for a Senior Product Engineer (Frontend) to shape what our product looks like and how it’s built. Specifically: - Lead on the deployment of LLMs as an enhancement/substitute to traditional interfaces - Own feature developments and fixes across the frontend from ideation to deployment Stack: Vue.js, Tailwind, Tanstack Contact: kimathi [at] deducta dot ai / Apply: https://apply.workable.com/deducta/j/8ADBB3795A/ Location: London, UK

score.reason: Vue and Tailwind expertise align with core stack, but UK-only hybrid location blocks Spain-based remote requirement. Tanstack is an unlisted tech gap.

needsReview.title: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural lang
needsReview.company: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed d
needsReview.location: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural language, offering insights to SMBs they couldn't get before. We're fully funded by our sibling company, and are looking for remote freelancers in the US and full-time, onsite employees in San Diego, California (if you're into that kind of thing). We're looking for experience in the following roles: + QA: We're looking for a QA engineer deeply familiar with the software lifecycle in the age of agentic coding. You'd have a lot of responsibility, but also the opportunity to define what solid QA looks like at Ontix. + Azure Cloud Engineer: We're a mostly-AWS shop, but we have a few potential customers that are deeply entrenched in the Azure ecosystem, including a migration from SharePoint to Fabric + OneLake. You'd be leading the charge on that. + Infosec + Automated Vulnerability Scanning: If you browse new CVEs over breakfast, we want to talk to you. There's a huge demand among our current customers for continuous vulnerability scanning, both in the codebase and on the deployed edge. We have some test platforms, but would love a more robust solution we can market. + Full-Stack WordPress Developer: Our sister company is a bit old school still: If you can parachute in to a PHP + Vue 2/3 + WordPress + AWS EC2 environment, we would love to pass on your number to them. We're looking to grow quickly as our client base expands. Healthcare, vision, and 401(k) for FTEs. If you're interested in any of these roles, or would like more information in general about us, please visit https://ontix.io or email l33t@ontix.io with a few sentences describing your experience, interest, and where you're located.
